title: USCIS Case Status
description: JSON Schema for a USCIS immigration case status response, representing the current processing status and historical timeline for an immigration application identified by receipt number.

receiptNumber.description: The 13-character USCIS receipt number for this immigration case

formType.description: USCIS form type associated with this case

submittedDate.description: Date the immigration application was submitted to USCIS

modifiedDate.description: Date the case status was most recently updated

status.description: Current case status label in English
examples: Case Is Being Actively Reviewed by USCIS
Response to Request for Evidence Was Received

description.description: Detailed description of the current case status in English

statusEsDesc.description: Detailed description of the current case status in Spanish

historicalCaseStatuses.description: Historical timeline of case status events, most recent first

HistoricalStatus.title: Historical Status
HistoricalStatus.description: A historical case status event in the case timeline

status.description: Status label for this historical event

description.description: Description of this historical status event in English

descriptionEsDesc.description: Description of this historical status event in Spanish
